name: Bleu Cheese Spread with Figs
recipeIngredient: California dried figs, sliced into rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or mixing bowl, combine the crumbled Bleu cheese and cream cheese.
2. Add the dry white wine, Worcestershire sauce, paprika, garlic powder, and hot pepper sauce.
3. Blend until smooth.
4. If making ahead of time, refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. Sprinkle with additional paprika and garnish with parsley.
6. Serve with fig slices and crackers.
